description_long: This is a high-top canvas sneaker, predominantly white in color, with a classic Converse All Star circular logo patch on the inner ankle. The shoe features a white rubber toe cap, metal eyelets for lacing, and a red stripe running along the midsole above a textured white rubber outsole. The laces are white and threaded through eight pairs of eyelets, and the shoe shows visible signs of wear, including creasing and some discoloration. The upper is made of canvas, while the sole is constructed from rubber, and the interior likely contains a fabric lining and foam insole. The overall silhouette is iconic and instantly recognizable as a casual, urban footwear staple.
description: A white high-top canvas sneaker with a Converse All Star logo patch, white laces, and a red-striped rubber sole, showing visible signs of wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Converse All Star logo patch, white canvas upper, and red-striped rubber sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white laces, rubber toe cap, and symmetrical eyelet arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view without the logo patch, displaying the canvas upper and full length of the red-striped sole.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the heel seam, back of the collar, and partial logo patch.
attribute_logo: Circular Converse All Star patch on the inner ankle, blue star with red and blue text on a white background.
